While competitive with PPO and GRPO under matched training compute, this prediction-level ensemble incurs K forward passes per test example and does not extend cleanly to free-form generation. We ask whether the rewarded population can instead be folded into a single deployable model, replacing the inference-time ensemble with one consolidated update. A split-half analysis over 25 model-task pairs reveals reproducible low-rank structure in every case. We turn this geometry into CoRP (Consolidating Rewarded Perturbations), a gradient-free operator that combines reward-weighted aggregation, compatibility-aware reweighting, and a held-out validation gate, with no gradient flowing through the language model. Across five language models from 0.5B to 8B and five tasks covering math, code, and creative writing, CoRP improves the base model by 8.1 points on average. Using one tenth of RandOpt's perturbation budget, CoRP exceeds single-inference RandOpt by 6.5 points and recovers more than half of the gain of the 50-pass majority-vote ensemble, at one forward pass per test example.

</details>


### [226] [Reliable Multilingual Orthopedic Decision Support from Clinical Narratives: Language-Aware Adaptation and Verification-Guided Deferral](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31512)
*Danish Ali,Li Xiaojian,Sundas Iqbal,Farrukh Zaidi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出面向英语、印地语和旁遮普语骨科临床文本的可靠性分类框架IndicBERT-HPA，通过语言感知适配头与选择性验证层，在自然临床分布下达到Macro-F1 0.8792，选择性验证在72.3%覆盖率下准确率84.4%，优于零样本大语言模型，支持临床决策中的显式延期机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源医疗环境中，骨科临床记录存在专业术语复杂、多语言混合、证据不完整、标签不平衡及语言依赖的文档模式，现有方法难以同时保证多语言下的分类可靠性与稳定性。

Method: 提出IndicBERT-HPA框架：在IndicBERT基础上添加语言感知骨科适配器头；对比任务对齐的多语言Transformer编码器、微调DistilBERT、零样本指令微调LLMs；引入选择性验证层，包含置信度门控、证据一致性检查和语言风险评估。

Result: 自然临床分布下IndicBERT-HPA取得Macro-F1 0.8792、Macro-AUROC 0.894、AUPRC 0.902；零样本LLMs效果显著低于任务适应编码器；选择性验证在72.3%覆盖率下达到84.4%准确率和0.76 Macro-F1。

Conclusion: 任务适应的多语言编码器结合选择性验证框架，是低资源多语言骨科临床决策支持的可靠方案，显式延期机制能有效提升系统安全性。

Abstract: Multilingual orthopedic decision support remains challenging in low-resource healthcare settings, where clinical narratives contain specialized terminology, mixed scripts, incomplete evidence, label imbalance and language-dependent documentation patterns. This article presents a reliability-oriented framework for classifying free-text orthopedic notes in English, Hindi and Punjabi. We compare task-aligned multilingual transformer encoders, a task-fine-tuned DistilBERT baseline, zero-shot instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) and a domain-adaptive encoder, IndicBERT-HPA. IndicBERT-HPA augments IndicBERT with language-aware orthopedic adapter heads to support clinically relevant multilingual representation learning. Evaluation extends beyond aggregate accuracy to per-class performance, ROC-AUC, AUPRC, expected calibration error, cross-language stability and robustness under controlled balanced and natural-prevalence distributions. The evaluated zero-shot LLMs remain substantially less effective than task-adapted encoders for closed-set classification, with language-dependent instability. Under natural clinical prevalence, IndicBERT-HPA achieves the strongest overall performance, reaching an averaged Macro-F1 of 0.8792, Macro-AUROC of 0.894 and AUPRC of 0.902. We further implement a deterministic selective-verification layer combining confidence gating, evidence-consistency checking and language-risk screening. On a randomly selected held-out 5,000-record subset, it achieves 84.4% selective accuracy and 0.76 selective Macro-F1 at 72.3% coverage, compared with 71.5% accuracy and 0.65 Macro-F1 for accept-all prediction. These results support reliability-oriented multilingual clinical decision support with explicit deferral.

</details>


### [227] [If LLMs Have Human-Like Attributes, Then So Does Age of Empires II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31514)
*Adrian de Wynter*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文指出，当前许多研究赋予大语言模型（LLMs）拟人化属性（如道德、语言理解）的结论可能并不成立。通过在《帝国时代II》上训练简单神经网络，作者论证了在足够强大的基底（如乐高、波士顿地区）中，任何实体都可能表现出类似属性，因此LLMs的拟人化属性在经验上并非唯一。作者提出应以"LLM非唯一性"作为零假设来设计实验，否则讨论将陷入循环或空洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多研究将LLMs及基于LLM的智能体工作流描述为具有拟人化属性（如道德、自然语言理解能力），但这些结论可能是错误的。作者并非要否定或肯定这些属性是否存在，而是指出这些结论在方法论上存在问题，需要更严谨的论证框架。

Method: 1. 在《帝国时代II》上构建并训练简单神经网络 2. 类比论证：指出任何在足够强大基底（如乐高、波士顿地区）上的实体都可呈现类似属性 3. 逻辑分析：证明假设拟人化属性存在与否会导致循环或空洞结论 4. 提出"零假设"：以LLM非唯一性代替拟人化假设作为实验设计的出发点 5. 补充证明《帝国时代II》功能完备且图灵完备

Result: 1. LLMs的拟人化属性在经验上非唯一 2. 假设拟人化属性存在与否，若不依赖基底并推广至一般化，会导致循环论证或无关结论 3. 提出以"LLM非唯一性"作为零假设的替代框架 4. 证明《帝国时代II》功能完备且图灵完备

Conclusion: 任何基于经验的讨论都需要明确的度量标准，否则解释权将落入表征层的陷阱中。作者主张在研究LLMs时采用更谨慎的"零假设"范式，即默认LLMs不具有拟人化特殊性，直到有明确证据推翻为止。

Abstract: Much research has been carried out on large language models (LLMs) and LLM-powered agentic workflows. However, many works within the field state emergence of, ascribe to, or assume, generalised anthropomorphic attributes to them (e.g., morality or understanding of natural language). Our goal is not to argue in favour or against the existence of these attributes, but to point out that these conclusions could be incorrect. For this we build and train a simple neural network on the videogame Age of Empires II, and note that any entity in a sufficiently-powerful substrate, such as LEGO or the Greater Boston Area, could also present such attributes. Hence, the purported anthropomorphic attributes of LLMs are empirically non-unique: although some properties (e.g., responses to prompts) could remain constant, others, such as the interpretation of their perceived behaviour, might change with the substrate. Thus, any empirically-grounded discussion requires explicit measurement criteria; otherwise the interpretation is left to the representation. We then show that assuming that these attributes exist or not in a system, independent of the substrate and in a generalised way, leads to either circular or uninformative conclusions, regardless of the experimenter's viewpoint on the subject. Finally we propose a 'null' assumption, where one assumes LLM non-uniqueness instead of assuming anthropomorphic attributes to set up an experiment, along with examples of it. We also discuss potential objections to our work, briefly survey the field, and prove that \textit{Age of Empires II} is functionally- and Turing-complete.

</details>


### [228] [UniAudio-Token: Empowering Semantic Speech Tokenizers with General Audio Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31521)
*Yuhan Song,Linhao Zhang,Aiwei Liu,Chuhan Wu,Sijun Zhang,Wei Jia,Yuan Liu,Houfeng Wang,Xiao Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: UniAudio-Token是一种增强语义语音分词器的方法，通过Semantic-Acoustic Primitives (SAP)和Semantic-Acoustic Equilibrium (SAE)两项创新，在不损害语音能力的前提下赋予其通用音频感知能力，在理解和生成任务上均优于现有单码本基线分词器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义语音分词器虽然紧凑且具有良好的语言对齐能力，但由于过度聚焦于语言抽象，导致"声学盲区"（acoustic blindness），限制了其在通用音频任务上的适用性。

Method: 提出UniAudio-Token框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) Semantic-Acoustic Primitives (SAP)——通过将音频分解为语言内容、声音属性、听觉场景基元来提供结构化监督；(2) Semantic-Acoustic Equilibrium (SAE)——引入内容感知的门控机制，从浅层自适应恢复细粒度声学细节。

Result: UniAudio-Token学习了全面的通用表示，同时保持了高保真的语音生成能力。集成到下游LLM后，在理解和生成任务上均优于所有单码本基线分词器。

Conclusion: UniAudio-Token可有效作为统一音频接口，并且代码和模型已开源。

Abstract: Semantic speech tokenizers have become a widely used interface for Audio-LLMs, owing to their compact single-codebook design and strong linguistic alignment. However, their focus on linguistic abstraction induces acoustic blindness, limiting their applicability beyond speech-centric tasks. We propose UniAudio-Token, a framework that empowers semantic tokenizers with general audio perception without compromising speech ability. Instead of altering the semantic paradigm, UniAudio-Token mitigates its information loss through two key innovations: (1) Semantic-Acoustic Primitives (SAP) provide structured supervision by decomposing audio into linguistic content, vocal attributes, and auditory-scene primitives; and (2) Semantic-Acoustic Equilibrium (SAE) introduces a content-aware gating mechanism that adaptively restores fine-grained acoustic details from shallow layers. Extensive evaluations show that UniAudio-Token learns comprehensive universal representations while preserving high-fidelity speech generation. When integrated with downstream LLMs, it outperforms all single-codebook baseline tokenizers on both understanding and generation tasks, effectively serving as a unified audio interface. We publicly release all our code, including training and inference scripts, together with the model checkpoints at https://github.com/Tencent/Universal_Audio_Tokenizer.

</details>


### [229] [Preference-Aware Rubric Learning for Personalized Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31545)
*Yilun Qiu,Xiaoyan Zhao,Yang Zhang,Yuxin Chen,Cilin Yan,Jiayin Cai,Xiaolong Jiang,Yao Hu,Yoko Yamakata,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出将个性化评估重构为学习问题，通过PARL框架从用户历史交互中学习偏好感知评估准则，并利用自验证机制和对比强化学习目标来捕捉用户特定的决策边界，显著提升了评估的准确性、代表性和区分度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法（自动指标、LLM-as-judge）无法捕捉用户长期交互历史中嵌入的主观、用户特定偏好，缺乏可靠的个性化评估范式。

Method: 提出个性化评估即学习范式，将评估重构为学习问题；具体框架PARL包含：1) 从原始用户历史中诱导偏好感知评估准则；2) 自验证机制确保与用户偏好一致；3) 对比强化学习目标，通过对比用户撰写回复与竞争性个性化模型输出，学习精确的用户决策边界。

Result: 在真实个性化文本生成任务上，PARL一致地诱导出高保真评估准则，可靠地识别与用户对齐的回复，跨用户和任务具有良好泛化能力，捕捉到稳定的风格偏好和细粒度评估模式。

Conclusion: 个性化评估应从静态判断转向学习范式，PARL通过偏好感知准则学习有效解决了现有方法的核心局限，为个性化对齐评估提供了更可靠的新路径。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve from general-purpose assistants to user-centric agents, personalization has become central to aligning model behavior with individual preferences, making the evaluation of personalized alignment a critical bottleneck. Existing evaluation methods-ranging from automatic metrics to LLM-as-a-judge approaches-fail to capture subjective, user-specific preferences embedded in long-term interaction histories. We identify three essential principles for reliable and effective personalized evaluation: Representativeness, User-Consistency, and Discriminativeness. To address these principles, we introduce Personalized Evaluation as Learning, a paradigm that formulates personalized evaluation as a learning problem rather than a static judgment. Under this paradigm, we propose PARL (Preference-Aware Rubric Learning for Personalized Evaluation), a framework that learns to induce preference-aware evaluation rubrics directly from raw user histories and performs a self-validation mechanism to ensure consistency with the user's preferences. PARL integrates rubric induction with a discriminative reinforcement learning objective that contrasts user-authored responses against competitive personalized model outputs, enabling the learned rubrics to capture precise, user-specific decision boundaries. Experiments on real-world personalized text generation tasks show that PARL consistently induces high-fidelity rubrics that reliably identify user-aligned responses and generalize across users and tasks, while capturing stable stylistic preferences and fine-grained evaluative patterns. To ensure reproducibility, our code is available at https://github.com/SnowCharmQ/PARL.

</details>


### [230] [Semantic Triplet Restoration: A Novel Protocol for Hierarchical Table Understanding in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31550)
*Yibin Zhao,Fangxin Shang,Dingrui Yang,Yuqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Semantic Triplet Restoration (STR)协议，将表格单元重写为<item path, feature path, value>三元组，并配合TripletQL路由机制，在四个中英文表格问答基准上达到或超越HTML基线，同时减少输入token，对小模型和长表格场景尤其有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格问答方法使用HTML或Markdown等布局导向的序列化表示，存在标记开销大、需要LLM从行列跨度推断表头-单元对齐关系的问题，缺乏显式的语义表示。

Method: 提出Semantic Triplet Restoration (STR)协议，将每个单元格表示为原子事实<item path, feature path, value>，其中item path指定行实体，feature path指定层级属性，value为单元格内容；同时设计TripletQL轻量查询感知路由器，为每个问题选择合适的三元组渲染或过滤子集。

Result: 在四个中英文表格QA基准上，STR匹配或超越HTML基线并减少输入token；对于更小的语言模型和更长的表格上下文，相对收益更大。

Conclusion: 显式语义表示在约束推理预算下尤其有用，为表格问答提供了一种更高效、更语义化的替代方案。

Abstract: Table question answering requires models to recover semantic relations encoded implicitly by two-dimensional layout, merged cells, and hierarchical headers. Current pipelines typically use HTML or Markdown as intermediate table representations, but these layout-oriented serializations introduce markup overhead and require large language models to infer header-cell alignments from row and column spans. We propose Semantic Triplet Restoration (STR), a protocol that rewrites each cell as an atomic fact <item path, feature path, value>, where the item path specifies the row-wise entity, the feature path specifies the hierarchical attribute, and the value contains the cell content. We also present TripletQL, a lightweight query-aware router that uses STR to select an appropriate rendering or filtered subset of triplets for each question. Across four Chinese and English table-QA benchmarks, STR matches or improves upon HTML-based baselines while reducing input tokens. The relative benefit grows for smaller language models and longer table contexts, suggesting that explicit semantic representations are especially useful under constrained inference budgets. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Phoenix-ni/STR.git .

</details>


### [231] [What Am I Missing? Question-Answering as Hidden State Probing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31561)
*Chu Fei Luo,Samuel Dahan,Xiaodan Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在推理过程中使用提问作为干预手段，通过学生-教师框架分析模型隐状态，发现提问带来的自我诊断信号能预测最终正确性，但干预在纠正错误轨迹的同时也会损害正确轨迹，揭示了诊断与纠正之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 链式推理虽然提升了LLM的推理能力，但其内部机制仍不明确——相同输入和部分解下多次采样会得到不同答案。作者希望利用提问作为推理时干预，从模型隐状态中提取关于轨迹正确性的信号。

Method: 设计学生-教师框架：学生向教师提问。在提问前后训练探针（probe）分析学生隐状态，预测轨迹最终正确性。将提问建模为序贯决策问题，以探针得分为质量指标，定义门控策略（gating policy）选择是否提问以最大化正确概率。

Result: 提问前的隐状态信号即可预测最终正确性，表明自我诊断（而非信息传递）是关键。干预效果高度依赖模型的自一致性。门控策略能捕捉正确性和不确定性，但干预对正确轨迹的损害与对错误轨迹的修复同等程度。

Conclusion: 诊断与纠正之间存在根本性差距：模型能检测自身不确定性但缺乏有效修正能力。这对语言模型在不确定性下的自我改进能力提出了更广泛的挑战。

Abstract: Test-time reasoning has become a significant field of study since the introduction of chain-of-thought reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, the mechanisms of this reasoning process are still under-explored -- from the same input prompt, and even the same partial solution, LLMs can produce varied answers if sampled multiple times. We propose to leverage question-asking as an inference-time intervention that articulates information about the model's hidden state. To achieve that, we present a student-teacher setting where a student asks questions to a teacher. We train a probe on the student's hidden state before and after asking a question and find it is predictive of the trajectory's final correctness, even before generating the teacher's answer. This suggests there is a meaningful signal from the self-diagnosis that occurs during question generation rather than information transfer from the teacher. We then frame question-asking as a sequential decision problem, using this probe as a quality score, and define a gating policy to ask questions that maximize likelihood of correctness. We find that the success of question-asking as an intervention is largely dependent on the model's self-consistency. Our empirical results show a gap between detection and recovery; while our gating policy captures model correctness and uncertainty, interventions are equally likely to harm correct trajectories as they are to recover incorrect ones. This gap between diagnosis and correction has broader implications on language models' capacity for self-refinement under uncertainty.

</details>


### [232] [Disagreeing Rationales: Rethinking Classification and Explainability Evaluation in Hate Speech Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31563)
*Benedetta Muscato,Beiduo Chen,Gizem Gezici,Barbara Plank,Fosca Giannotti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统性地统一了人类标签与解释（token级理由）的评估框架，发现在主观NLP任务（如仇恨言论检测）中，软表示（soft representations）在分类和可解释性指标上均优于硬表示，表明需要重新思考主观NLP中的评估方式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类标注中的分歧在标签层面已广为人知，但token级理由（rationales）中的变异却未被充分探索；同时缺乏统一的评估方法来衡量标签和理由的质量，尤其是在主观性强的任务中。

Method: 将多种模型、训练策略、损失函数和评估指标统一到单一协议下，系统地在不同的标签空间（硬/软）和理由表示空间（硬/中间/软）上重新实现；分类指标围绕预测性和分布性两个关键属性组织，可解释性指标通过合理性、忠实性和复杂度三个维度评估。

Result: 硬指标和软指标都更偏好软表示（soft representations），表明软表示能更有效地捕捉人类标注中的变异。

Conclusion: 需要重新思考主观NLP任务中的评估方式，软表示应被重视以更好地捕捉人类推理的丰富性。

Abstract: Human disagreement is ubiquitous and well-known in labeling. However, variation in explanations, captured through token-level human rationales, remains far less explored. At the same time, it is unclear how to best evaluate human labels and rationales -- or even how to best aggregate rationales beyond majority vote -- in light of this variation. Yet, rationales may provide additional insights into the richness of human reasoning, that may differ in style, values and interpretations -- especially in subjective NLP tasks like hate speech detection. In this work, we unify diverse models, training strategies, loss functions, and existing evaluation metrics under a single protocol by systematically re-implementing them across different label and rationale representation spaces. Classification metrics are organized around two key properties -- predictive and distributional -- while explainability metrics through three complementary dimensions: plausibility, faithfulness, and complexity. In this unified supervision framework, we evaluate model behavior across classification and explainability metrics, as well as metric sensitivity to the choice of label (hard and soft) and rationale representation space (hard, intermediate and soft). Results show that both hard and soft metrics favor softer representations, highlighting their effectiveness in capturing variation and the need to rethink evaluation in subjective NLP.

</details>


### [233] [What Gets Unmasked First? Trajectory Analysis of Diffusion Models for Graph-to-Text Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31564)
*Qing Wang,Jacob Devasier,Chengkai Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）用于图到文本生成，发现MDLM在解码时优先生成实体，然后关系词和功能词，最后结构词。SFT会破坏这一策略导致信息遗漏或幻觉，提出λ缩放结构解码（无训练推理时修改）恢复+9.4 BLEU-4。引入Graph-LLaDA整合图Transformer编码器，跨数据集评估表明MDLM方法泛化能力显著优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型在生成式任务上展现出潜力，但在图到文本生成任务中尚未被系统研究。此外，标准SFT微调被发现会破坏MDLM的自然解码策略，导致信息遗漏或幻觉，亟需提出解决方案。

Method: 1) 首次系统分析MDLM在图到文本生成中的解码轨迹；2) 发现SFT导致结构词过早锚定的失败模式；3) 提出λ缩放结构解码，在推理时降低结构token置信度；4) 提出Graph-LLaDA，将图Transformer编码器集成到LLaDA解码过程中。

Result: λ缩放结构解码恢复+9.4 BLEU-4；跨数据集评估显示LLM和MDLM方法泛化能力显著优于先前基线。

Conclusion: MDLM在结构化生成任务中有独特优势，未来可进一步探索扩散模型在结构化文本生成中的应用。

Abstract: We present the first systematic study of masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) for graph-to-text generation. We analyze MDLM generation trajectories -- the order in which tokens are unmasked during iterative decoding -- and find that, unlike autoregressive LLMs which generate text linearly, MDLMs naturally prioritize entities first, followed by relational and function words, with structural tokens resolved last. We further identify a previously undocumented failure mode of supervised fine-tuning: SFT disrupts this strategy by prematurely anchoring structural sentence-ending tokens early in the decoding trajectory, effectively fixing the output length which can lead to omitted or hallucinated information. To address this, we propose lambda-scaled structural decoding, a training-free inference-time modification that downweights structural token confidence and recovers +9.4 BLEU-4. Finally, we introduce Graph-LLaDA, which integrates a Graph Transformer encoder into LLaDA's decoding process to explicitly incorporate relational graph structure. Cross-dataset evaluation on LAGRANGE reveals that previous baselines overfit to dataset-specific patterns, while LLM- and MDLM-based approaches generalize significantly better.

</details>


### [234] [LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31584)
*Nianyi Lin,Jiajie Zhang,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LongTraceRL 通过知识图谱随机游走生成多跳问题，并利用搜索智能体轨迹构建高混淆性干扰文档，提出基于实体级过程监督的 rubric reward（仅用于正确答案），显著提升了长上下文推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 RLVR 方法在长上下文推理中存在两大问题：一是干扰项混淆度低，无法有效训练模型在大量干扰中定位关键信息；二是奖励信号稀疏（仅基于最终结果），无法监督中间推理步骤的质量。

Method: 1）数据构建：通过知识图谱随机游走生成多跳问题，利用搜索智能体轨迹构建层级干扰项（已读未引用的高混淆文档 + 搜索结果未打开的低混淆文档）；2）奖励设计：提出 rubric reward，将推理链上的金实体作为细粒度的实体级过程监督，仅对最终答案正确的响应施加该奖励（正样本策略），防止奖励黑客。

Result: 在三个推理 LLM（4B-30B）和五个长上下文基准上，LongTraceRL 一致优于强基线，并且促进了全面、基于证据的推理。

Conclusion: LongTraceRL 通过高质量层级干扰数据 + 细粒度过程奖励信号，有效提升了长上下文多跳推理能力，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Long-context reasoning remains a central challenge for large language models, which often fail to locate and integrate key information in extensive distracting content. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has shown promise for this task, yet existing methods are limited by low-confusability distractors and sparse, outcome-only reward signals that cannot supervise intermediate reasoning steps. To address these issues, we introduce \textsc{LongTraceRL}. For data construction, we generate multi-hop questions via knowledge graph random walks and leverage search agent trajectories to build \emph{tiered distractors}: documents the agent read but did not cite (high confusability) and documents that appeared in search results but were never opened (low confusability), producing training contexts that are far more challenging than those built by random sampling or one-shot search. For reward design, we propose a \emph{rubric reward} that uses the gold entities along each reasoning chain as fine-grained, entity-level process supervision. This rubric reward is applied only to responses with correct final answers (positive-only strategy), distinguishing the reasoning quality among correct responses and preventing reward hacking. Experiments on three reasoning LLMs (4B--30B) across five long-context benchmarks demonstrate that \textsc{LongTraceRL} consistently outperforms strong baselines and encourages comprehensive, evidence-grounded reasoning. Codes, datasets and models are available at \href{https://github.com/THU-KEG/LongTraceRL}{https://github.com/THU-KEG/LongTraceRL}.

</details>


### [235] [Language Models Learn Constructional Semantics, Not To Mention Syntax: Investigating LM Understanding of Paired-Focus Constructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31586)
*Wesley Scivetti,Ethan Wilcox,Nathan Schneider,Kanishka Misra,Leonie Weissweiler*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究开放源码模型对罕见配对焦点构式（如"let alone"、"much less"）的语义理解能力，发现中等规模模型能掌握其语义，且该能力出现在训练后期，与世界知识增长相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽能理解罕见构式的语义，但开放源码模型是否具备此能力尚不清楚，且其学习动态机制未知。

Method: 构建包含配对焦点构式的数据集，通过标量形容词语义和世界知识两个维度测试；评估不同参数规模、架构和预训练数据量的模型；分析开放检查点模型的训练动态。

Result: 中等规模模型对配对焦点构式的形式和语义均敏感，但以人类规模数据训练的模型在所有语义评估中失败；配对焦点语义理解晚于句法知识出现，且与世界知识增长相关。

Conclusion: 中等规模开放源码模型能够理解罕见配对焦点构式，且其语义知识与世界知识领域存在关联。

Abstract: Grasping the semantics of rare constructions (form-meaning pairings) has been shown to be a challenging problem that has currently only been solved by the largest LLMs. It remains an open question if open-source models have robust constructional understanding, and if so, what learning dynamics underlie the acquisition of this knowledge. Focusing on a set of rare Paired-Focus constructions in English (e.g. "let alone", "much less"), we construct a novel dataset to test their meanings using both scalar adjectival semantics and general world knowledge. Testing a wide range of models differing in parameter count, architecture, and pretraining dataset size, we find that several modestly sized models are sensitive to both the forms and the meanings of Paired-Focus constructions, though models trained on human-scale data fail at all meaning evaluations. Turning to training dynamics for a set of open-checkpoint models, we find that Paired-Focus understanding emerges later in training than Paired-Focus syntactic knowledge, and that learning of Paired-Focus semantics is correlated with gains in some domains of world knowledge. Overall, our empirical results support the conclusion that modestly sized open-source models can grasp the rare Paired-Focus constructions, and demonstrate a connection between knowledge of Paired-Focus constructions and other meaning domains.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [236] [Dynamic Interaction-Aware and Causality-Disentangled Framework for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30994)
*Guangyuan Dong,Ziwei Hong,Shenghao Liu,Chenyu Wu,Yuanyuan Fang,Zihao Li,Xudong Zhang,Bingchen Liu,Yuchen Zhang,Haitao Ding,Zhenzhou Zhou,Ziyu Song*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出动态多模态因果解缠与自适应融合框架（MCAF），通过因果干预模块解缠语言模态的情感偏差、动态路由器自适应调节多模态交互，以及条件扩散去噪模块过滤冗余信息，在CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI数据集上取得最先进结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态情感分析方法面临两大挑战：1) 静态冲突抑制机制无法适应样本间的动态变化；2) 语言模态固有的情感偏见会误导其他模态的学习，且难以解缠。

Method: 1) 基于信息瓶颈原理的因果干预模块，通过结构因果模型解缠语言特征中的情感偏见，得到"去混杂"的语言表示；2) 动态多模态路由器，在特征、时间、模态三个层面实时评估交互状态（互补/冲突/冗余），自适应分配权重和路由信息流；3) 轻量级条件扩散去噪模块，对融合后的联合表示进行迭代去噪，过滤残留无关信息，生成鲁棒的超级模态表示。

Result: 在CMU-MOSI上Acc-2/F1达86.52%/86.51%，在CMU-MOSEI上达86.72%/86.65%，均取得新的最先进结果，并在其他指标上保持强竞争力。

Conclusion: MCAF框架有效解决了动态交互感知、情感偏差解缠和模型可解释性问题，验证了因果干预与扩散去噪在多模态情感分析中的有效性。

Abstract: Although Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) effectively leverages rich information from language, visual, and acoustic modalities, existing methods still face two core challenges: 1) static conflict suppression mechanisms fail to adapt to dynamic variations across samples, and 2) the inherent sentimental bias within the language modality, which can misguide learning from other modalities, remains entangled. To this end, we propose a Dynamic Multimodal Causal Disentanglement and Adaptive Fusion Framework (MCAF). Its cornerstone is the Multi-Granularity Causal Dynamic Router and a Conditional Diffusion Denoising Module. First, we introduce a causal intervention module based on the information bottleneck principle, which builds a Structural Causal Model to disentangle sentimental bias from language features, yielding a "de-confounded" language representation as a pure guiding signal. Second, we devise a Dynamic Multimodal Router that evaluates the interaction states (complementary, conflicting, or redundant) among visual, acoustic, and de-confounded language signals in real-time across three levels: feature, temporal, and modality, then adaptively allocates weights and routes information flow for fine-grained regulation. Finally, a lightweight Conditional Diffusion Denoising Module performs iterative denoising on the fused joint representation to explicitly filter out residual irrelevant information, generating a robust hyper-modality representation. Extensive experiments on the CMU-MOSI and CMU-MOSEI benchmarks show that MCAF sets new state-of-the-art on key classification metrics, achieving an Acc-2/F1 of 86.52%/86.51% on MOSI and 86.72%/86.65% on MOSEI, while remaining highly competitive on others. Comprehensive analyses and visualizations further validate its efficacy in dynamically perceiving interactions, disentangling bias, and enhancing interpretability.

</details>


### [237] [A Pilot Study on Curator-Guided Multilingual Art Description for Blind and Low-Vision Audiences with Small Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31080)
*Iosif Tsangko,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,George Margetis,Ioana Crihana,Björn W. Schuller*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文探索使用Qwen2.5-VL-3B小模型，为博物馆场景下的德语、罗马尼亚语、塞尔维亚语生成适合盲人和低视力人群的多语言艺术描述，发现针对特定语言微调比统一多语言模型更稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 盲人和低视力群体在博物馆中难以获得多语言、隐私友好的视觉艺术描述，现有方案受限于知识产权和网络条件，需要轻量级本地部署方案。

Method: 构建平行BLV导向的图注语料库，使用Qwen2.5-VL-3B小模型，对比语言特定LoRA适配器与统一多语言适配器的效果，结合自动评测和LLM评判进行验证。

Result: 针对罗马尼亚语和塞尔维亚语，语言特定适配器在可控性和视觉描述质量上更稳定；德语中多语言适配器仍有竞争力。

Conclusion: 小规模本地VLM在多语言BLV艺术描述中有部署潜力，但需要更大规模用户研究和更广语言覆盖才能得出普适结论。

Abstract: Blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences remain underserved by visual art descriptions, particularly across languages and in museum settings where privacy and intellectual-property constraints may favour small on-premise vision-language models (VLMs). This pilot study investigates curator-guided multilingual art description with Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct for German, Romanian, and Serbian. We construct a parallel BLV-oriented caption corpus from artwork images and metadata, and compare language-specific LoRA adapters with a single multilingual adapter under a fixed backbone and training budget. Evaluation combines automatic lexical and embedding-based metrics with an LLM-as-Judge protocol calibrated against a small Romanian BLV pilot study. Under our pilot setup, language-specific adapters show more stable controllability and visually grounded description quality for Romanian and Serbian, while multilingual adaptation remains competitive in German. We frame these findings as deployment-oriented evidence for small on-premise VLMs, and highlight the need for larger BLV user studies and broader language coverage before drawing general conclusions about multilingual accessibility.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [238] [Kernel Foundry: A Diagnosis-driven Evolutionary Kernel Optimizer with Multi-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30359)
*Zixuan Huang,Da Chen,Kecheng Huang,Lihao Yin,Xing Li,Huiling Zhen,Mingxuan Yuan,Zili Shao*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: Kernel Foundry是一个结合专家引导初始化、多岛进化搜索和诊断反馈的GPU内核自动优化框架，在KernelBench上实现了高达100%的正确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的GPU内核在正确性和效率方面表现不佳，亟需一种能够兼顾两者的自动优化方法。

Method: 采用专家引导的检索增强初始化、多岛进化搜索框架，结合结构化诊断反馈进行迭代优化，并通过中央经验库积累可复用知识，同时设计防作弊机制。

Result: 在KernelBench基准上持续优于强基线方法，Level 2任务达到100%正确率。

Conclusion: 诊断驱动的进化框架能有效提升GPU内核的正确性和性能，为自动化内核优化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Generating high-performance GPU kernels remains challenging due to the need for both correctness and hardware-aware optimization. While large language models (LLMs) show promise in code generation, they often fail to produce kernels that are both correct and efficient.
  We propose Kernel Foundry, a diagnosis-driven evolutionary framework for automatic GPU kernel optimization. Our method combines expert-guided, retrieval-augmented initialization with a multi-island evolutionary search, where candidate kernels are iteratively refined using structured diagnostic feedback. A centralized experience library accumulates reusable optimization knowledge to guide subsequent evolution, while explicit mechanisms prevent cheating behaviors that bypass kernel-level computation.
  Experiments on KernelBench show that our method consistently improves both correctness and performance over strong baselines, achieving up to 100% correctness on Level~2.

</details>


### [239] [Gradient-Free Training of Spiking Neural Networks via Low-Rank Evolution Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30361)
*Dhruv Patankar,Sachit Ramesha Gowda*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出EGGROLL方法，利用低秩分解减少进化策略（ES）在训练脉冲神经网络（SNN）时每个生成周期的内存开销，实现无梯度训练，在N-MNIST上达到79.21%准确率并加速2.23倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SNN在神经形态硬件上能效高，但训练困难：替代梯度方法不兼容片上学习，而进化策略（ES）虽然无需梯度，但计算成本随参数数量线性增长，对大型权重矩阵不实用。

Method: 提出EGGROLL，一种低秩分解ES扰动方法，将每个生成周期的内存开销从O(mn)降低到O(r(m+n))。结合LIF神经元SNN，在N-MNIST数据集上进行无梯度训练。

Result: 在N-MNIST上达到79.21%的测试准确率，相较于全秩ES，每个生成周期的实际时间加速2.23倍。

Conclusion: EGGROLL是一种可行的SNN训练方案，在精度-速度之间存在明确权衡，且无需替代梯度即可兼容神经形态硬件上的训练。

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer compelling energy efficiency on neuromorphic hardware, yet their training remains challenging because the discrete spike threshold is non-differentiable. Surrogate-gradient methods sidestep this by approximating the derivative, but they impose backpropagation infrastructure that is incompatible with on-chip learning. Evolution Strategies (\es) are a natural gradient-free alternative, yet their computational cost scales with the number of parameters, making them impractical for large weight matrices.
  We present a method for training SNNs using EGGROLL, a low-rank factorisation of ES perturbations that reduces per-generation memory from $\mathcal{O}(mn)$ to $\mathcal{O}(r(m{+}n))$. Combining EGGROLL with a Leaky Integrate-and-Fire SNN on N-MNIST, we demonstrate that gradient-free training achieves 79.21% test accuracy while reducing per-generation wall-clock time by 2.23$\times$ relative to full-rank ES. Our results demonstrate EGGROLL is viable for SNN training, with a clear accuracy-speed tradeoff, compatible with training on neuromorphic hardware without surrogate gradients.

</details>


### [240] [XOResNet: Exclusive-OR Meta-Residuals Facilitate Deep Spiking Neural Networks Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30362)
*Jianfang Wu,Junsong Wang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出XOResNet，通过OR-ADD捷径连接解决SNN残差结构中的脉冲冗余和信息丢失问题，并引入XOR元残差来减轻主干分支的冗余学习，在多个数据集上超越现有最先进的深度SNN模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SNN残差结构存在两个核心问题：1) 恒等映射中的脉冲冗余与非线性映射中的信息丢失；2) 主干分支中存在冗余学习。本文旨在解决这些根本性局限。

Method: 1) 提出OR-ADD (OA) 捷径连接，融合残差结构中两个分支的输出脉冲/电流；2) 引入XOR元残差，利用异或操作为主干分支选择预学习残差；3) 整合上述组件构建XOR残差块，进而搭建不同深度的XOResNet。

Result: 在Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和miniImageNet四个数据集上，XOResNet均优于现有基于梯度下降优化的最先进深度SNN模型。

Conclusion: OA捷径和XOR元残差组件有效克服了SNN中残差学习的根本限制，为构建高性能神经形态系统提供了新的架构设计思路。

Abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) hold promise for demonstrating superior learning and representation capabilities in deep models. Given the tremendous success of ResNet in deep learning, it would naturally follow to train deep SNNs with residual learning. However, existing residual structures for constructing deep SNNs still present challenges of spike redundancy or information loss, as well as redundant learning. In the present study, we first aim to address issues of relative spike redundancy in identity mapping and information loss in non-identity mapping. To this end, we propose an OR-ADD (OA) shortcut connection to merge output spikes/currents from two branches in the residual structure. Furthermore, to mitigate redundant learning in the backbone branch of the residual structure, we introduce the concept of XOR meta-residuals, i.e., selecting pre-learning residuals using the Exclusive-OR (XOR) operation for the backbone branch. Finally, by integrating the OA shortcut and XOR meta-residuals, we devise the XOR residual block and further construct XOResNet with varying depths based on this block. Extensive experiments on four datasets, Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and miniImageNet, show that the proposed XOResNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art deep SNNs optimized via gradient descent. These results validate the effectiveness of our OA shortcut and XOR meta-residual components in overcoming fundamental limitations of residual learning in SNNs, providing new architectural insights for building high-performance neuromorphic systems.

</details>


### [241] [Reinterpreting Safety Thresholds as Neuron Spiking Thresholds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30368)
*Enrico Del Re,Mohamed Sabry,Cristina Olaverri-Monreal*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于生物启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）方法，将传统固定阈值的替代安全度量（SSMs）重新解释为泄漏整合发射（LIF）神经元的尖峰阈值，并通过人类制动数据训练模型，使SNN能够更好地匹配人类对交通风险的主观感知，实现了客观SSM与主观安全感知的融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于SSM的交通风险评估大多使用固定阈值，无法捕捉人类对持续性临界状态的响应或对短暂高风险峰值的反应，因此需要一种更符合人类感知机制的方法。

Method: 将SSM阈值建模为LIF神经元的尖峰阈值，构建多SSM输入的尖峰神经网络（SNN），并使用3D-CoAutoSim平台（CARLA/Unreal + 6自由度运动平台）记录的人类制动数据训练SNN，使其尖峰活动与人类制动起始点对齐。

Result: 训练后的尖峰活动在定性上与跨场景的制动行为一致，能捕捉到单纯阈值交叉无法解释的反应；不同被试的学习输入阈值相对一致，而学习到的衰减因子编码了不同的时间敏感性。

Conclusion: 尖峰动力学可以作为客观SSM与主观人类安全感知之间融合的机制，为更符合人类感知的自动驾驶风险评估提供了新思路。

Abstract: Surrogate Safety Measures (SSMs) are extensively utilised in the evaluation of traffic risk in automated driving contexts. However, the majority of SSM-based evaluations employ fixed thresholds that fail to capture the human response to sustained borderline conditions or the reaction to brief, high-risk peaks. The present work proposes a biologically inspired reinterpretation of SSM thresholds. This is modelled as spiking thresholds of leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons, with multiple SSM inputs combined into a spiking neural network (SNN). The SNN is trained to emit spikes that are aligned with human braking onsets. The training data was recorded in a controlled car-following experiment using the 3D-CoAutoSim platform with CARLA/Unreal and a 6-DOF motion platform, where induced critical events were generated. The results demonstrate that the learned spiking activity qualitatively aligns with braking behaviour across scenarios and captures reactions that are not consistently explained by threshold crossings alone. Analysis across participants further indicates that learned input thresholds remain relatively consistent, while learned decay factors encode different temporal sensitivities for the SSMs. The findings of this study indicate that spiking dynamics may serve as a mechanism to facilitate the convergence of objective SSMs with subjective human safety perception.

</details>


### [242] [Updating the standard neuron model in artificial neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30370)
*Raul Mohedano,Thomas Batard,Erik Velasco-Salido,Ramsses De Los Santos Mendoza,Jorge H. Martínez,Stacey Levine,Marcelo Bertalmío*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出用更真实的皮层细胞模型替代传统人工神经网络中的点神经元模型，在不增加参数的情况下，显著提升了网络的表达能力、鲁棒性和学习速度，同时减少了对训练数据的需求和过拟合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ANNs自1950年代以来一直沿用神经科学中过于简化的点神经元模型，而神经科学已证明该模型无法充分代表许多基本神经过程，因此需要更真实的神经元模型来改善网络性能。

Method: 用最新的皮层细胞模型替代标准ANN中的点神经元模型，在不增加参数数量的前提下，通过理论分析和实验验证新模型的效果。

Result: 使用更真实的神经元模型后，ANNs在表达能力、鲁棒性、学习速度方面均有提升，同时减少了过拟合（记忆化）和对训练数据量的需求。

Conclusion: 引入更符合生物真实的神经元模型能够显著改善人工神经网络的性能，提示神经科学启发的架构设计仍有重要价值。

Abstract: From their inception in the 1950s, artificial neural networks (ANNs) started using the so-called point neuron model then prevalent in neuroscience, hoping that this analogy would allow for a better emulation of brain function. Over the years the neuroscience literature has shown that the point neuron model is too simplistic to properly represent many fundamental neural processes; however, the standard neuron model in ANNs still remains the same. Here we substitute it by a very recent model of cortical cells and demonstrate through theoretical analyses and experimental results how, simply by using a more realistic neural unit element without augmenting the number of parameters, the resulting ANNs offer a number of important advantages that include increases in expressivity, robustness and learning speed, and a reduction in memorization and the amount of training data needed.

</details>


### [243] [From Mean-Field Limits to Semiclassical Concentration: Global Convergence of the Canonical Evolutionary Strategy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30371)
*Matías Neto,Nicolás Garay,Luis Martí,Nayat Sanchez-Pi*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出规范进化策略（CES）框架，通过薛定谔型复制子-突变算子的半经典极限分析，证明了全局收敛由主特征函数驱动的"几何选择"机制主导，优先收敛到平坦鲁棒的最优解，并在高维偏移初始化场景中优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机连续优化中全局收敛的理论保证不足，现有共识驱动方法在全局最优解位于初始支撑集外时易出现方差过早坍塌，缺乏数学框架解释进化算法为何能偏好平坦、鲁棒的最优解而非尖锐局部极值。

Method: 1) 建立CES的受控数学框架；2) 从离散个体动力学到确定性平均场极限的严格层级推导；3) 通过薛定谔型复制子-突变算子的半经典极限分析，证明全局收敛由算子的主特征函数控制（几何选择）；4) d=30的高维基准实验验证。

Result: CES在偏移初始化场景中实现了更低的残差误差；标准共识驱动方法和基于梯度的方法无法有效迁移到全局最优时，CES通过内在质量传输机制成功收敛；几何选择机制自然偏好平坦、鲁棒的最优解。

Conclusion: CES框架从点态共识转向谱集中，为进化策略的全局收敛提供了无需额外数值启发式的稳健理论基础，数学上解释了"最平坦者生存"现象。

Abstract: We address the issue of global convergence in stochastic continuous optimization. For that purpose, we formulate the Canonical Evolutionary Strategy (CES) as a controlled mathematical framework to analyze global convergence in evolutionary algorithms via the semiclassical limit of a Schr{ö}dinger-type replicator-mutator equation. We provide a rigorous hierarchy from a discrete individual-based dynamics to a deterministic mean-field limit, demonstrating that global convergence is governed by the principal eigenfunction of the underlying operator. This property, defined as Geometric Selection, naturally prioritizes robust, flat optima over narrow local traps, offering a mathematical justification for the ''survival of the flattest'' phenomenon. Moreover, unlike consensus-driven methods that are prone to premature variance collapse when the global minimizer resides outside the initial support, the replicator-mutator dynamics of CES facilitate intrinsic mass transport. High-dimensional benchmarks (d = 30) confirm this advantage, showing that CES achieves lower residual errors in shifted initialization scenarios where standard consensus-driven and gradient-based methods fail to migrate effectively. By shifting the focus from point-wise consensus to spectral concentration, our framework provides a robust theoretical foundation for global convergence in Evolution Strategies (ES) without the need for additional numerical heuristics.

</details>


### [244] [Evolutionary Algorithm for Reservoir Learning and Yielding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30372)
*Julien Testu,Pierrick Legrand,Xavier Hinaut*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出EARLY框架，通过进化算法优化多储层回声状态网络的拓扑和超参数，在时序学习任务上优于随机搜索，且简单任务产生轻量架构，复杂任务产生模块化结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典回声状态网络(ESN)需要针对特定任务调整架构和超参数才能获得良好性能，缺乏自动化设计方法，限制了其通用性和可迁移性。

Method: 提出EARLY框架，将多储层ESN架构编码为基于图的基因组，应用交叉、变异和选择等进化操作来发现有效的网络配置，受大脑模块化组织启发。

Result: 进化架构在CogScale数据集多个时序任务上优于随机搜索；简单任务产生轻量架构，复杂任务偏好更丰富的模块化组织；在跨情境学习数据集上进一步验证了适应性。

Conclusion: 进化搜索有助于识别可复用的储层结构，可推广到更广泛的时序问题，并为任务难度与架构复杂度之间的关系提供了证据。

Abstract: Reservoir computing, a type of recurrent neural network, is a promising approach for temporal learning as it separates dynamic processing from the trained readout layer. However, classical Echo State Networks (ESNs) often require task-specific tuning of their architecture and hyperparameters to achieve good performance. This paper introduces EARLY (Evolutionary Algorithm for Reservoir Learning and Yielding), a framework designed to evolve both the topology and hyperparameters of multi-reservoir ESNs. Inspired by the modular organisation of the brain, EARLY encodes architectures as graph-based genomes and applies crossover, mutation, and selection to discover effective configurations. Our goal is to create both generic architectures and tasks inducing generalization. The method is evaluated on temporal learning tasks from the CogScale dataset. Results show that evolved architectures outperform those obtained with random search on several tasks and exhibit structural differences depending on task difficulty: simpler tasks yield lightweight architectures, while more complex tasks favour richer modular organisations. These findings suggest that evolutionary search can help identify reusable reservoir structures for a broader range of temporal problems. The evolved architectures are further evaluated on a cross-situational learning dataset to assess their ability to adapt to new environments.

</details>


### [245] [GP-GOMEA with GPU-Based Fitness Evaluations: Design and Performance Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30954)
*Jasper Post,Johannes Koch,Anton Bouter,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文首次实现了GP-GOMEA符号回归算法的完全GPU加速适配，通过设计GPU友好的表示和评估策略，大幅提升了评估吞吐量，使算法能在更大数据集和更复杂模板上高效运行，并首次在4小时内可靠回归了最大的费曼方程之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GP-GOMEA虽然能发现小型可解释模型，但计算成本高，限制了其在更大数据集和复杂表达式上的应用。受深度学习借助GPU并行计算取得成功的启发，作者希望将GPU加速引入GP-GOMEA以克服其计算瓶颈。

Method: 设计了一种GPU友好的模板化个体表示方法及相应的评估策略，利用种群搜索的天然并行性，将适应度评估过程完全部署在GPU上执行。

Result: 在四个标准符号回归基准上，GPU加速显著提高了评估吞吐量，在相同时间内可完成数个数量级的更多评估；对于更大数据集和更大种群规模，性能提升尤为明显；首次实现了在4小时内可靠回归最大的费曼方程之一。

Conclusion: GPU加速使GP-GOMEA能够处理此前不可行的分析任务，系统地揭示了表达式结构如何影响搜索难度，为符号回归的可扩展性提供了重要突破。

Abstract: GP-GOMEA is a state-of-the-art evolutionary algorithm for symbolic regression, known for discovering small and interpretable models. However, its computational cost remains substantial, limiting its applicability to larger datasets and more complex target expressions. In contrast, the rise of modern subsymbolic approaches, particularly deep learning, has been driven largely by the massive parallelism offered by GPUs. In this work, we take the first major step toward a fully GPU-accelerated GP-GOMEA by introducing a GPU-based fitness evaluation scheme. We design a GPU-friendly representation of GP-GOMEA's template-based individuals and a corresponding evaluation strategy that exploits the inherent parallelism of population-based search. This substantially increases evaluation throughput, enabling orders of magnitude more evaluations within the same time budget. Across four standard symbolic regression benchmarks, this increased evaluation capacity yields performance improvements, particularly for larger datasets and larger population sizes. Moreover, the ability to efficiently evaluate much larger datasets and more complex templates enables analyses that were previously infeasible, allowing us to systematically analyze what makes expressions increasingly difficult for GP-GOMEA, providing new insights into how expression structure affects search difficulty. Finally, for the first time, this expanded capability allows a problem-agnostic evolutionary algorithm to reliably regress one of the largest Feynman equations within four hours.

</details>


### [246] [Linear Ordering Problem: Time for a Change](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31051)
*Fabrizio Fagiolo,Marco Baioletti,Valentino Santucci*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文针对线性排序问题（LOP）提出了基于最新经济数据的新基准测试集，并设计了一种利用元启发式算法生成多样化高质量解集的算法方案，同时引入质量和多样性评估指标，在传统单解和新提出的多解场景下进行了实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LOP算法评估基于过时的宏观经济数据，无法反映当代经济结构；且LOP实例常存在多个差异显著的全局最优解，依赖单一解的应用面临挑战。

Method: 构建基于最新现实经济数据的新基准测试集；设计利用先进LOP元启发式算法生成多样化高质量解集的算法框架；提出同时评估解质量和多样性的指标。

Result: 在提出的新基准测试集上，分别在传统单解场景和新引入的多解场景下进行了实验并报告了结果。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了更贴合当代经济结构的LOP测试基准，并通过多解生成方案解决了单解应用中的局限性。

Abstract: The Linear Ordering Problem (LOP) is a fundamental combinatorial optimization problem with important applications in areas such as economics, social choice, and machine learning. Its most prominent use is the triangulation of economic input-output tables, which helps identify critical industries in an economy. Most existing algorithms have been evaluated on benchmarks derived from outdated macroeconomic data, which no longer reflect the structure of contemporary economies. Furthermore, LOP instances often exhibit many distinct global optima that can differ substantially from one another, creating challenges for applications that rely on a single solution. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel benchmark suite derived from up-to-date real-world economic data and an algorithmic scheme that leverages state-of-the-art LOP metaheuristics to generate diverse sets of high-quality solutions, together with metrics for assessing both quality and diversity. Experiments were conducted to report results on the proposed benchmark suite under both the traditional single-solution setting and the newly introduced multi-solution scenario

</details>


### [247] [Developing a novel Comorbidities Index for predicting 10-year mortality in Prostate Cancer patients: A computational data-driven approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31213)
*Davide Farinati,Francesco Barletta,Paolo Zaurito,Simone Scuderi,Nicholas Raison,Alejandro Granados,Prokar Dasgupta,Giorgio Gandaglia,Alberto Briganti*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个数据驱动的框架，利用群体生物启发算法重新校准Charlson合并症指数（CCI）的权重，并演化出针对前列腺癌（PCa）根治性前列腺切除术（RP）候选患者的替代符号公式，以更准确地预测十年其他原因死亡率，优化患者选择，避免过度治疗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始CCI权重可能不反映当代预后，而PCa根治性治疗仅推荐给预期寿命至少十年的患者。准确估计十年其他原因死亡率对平衡肿瘤获益与竞争风险至关重要，现有工具不够精准。

Method: 采用回顾性单中心队列，应用群体生物启发算法（PBBIA）重新校准合并症权重，并演化符号公式。比较了六种优化策略，包括基于遗传编程的符号回归、群体元启发式算法、临床验证基线和生存预测模型。

Result: GA、FST-PSO和SLIM优于原始CCI和PCCI，纳入PCa特异性变量后，一致性指数提升高达0.1。GPLearn生成紧凑可解释的模型，性能具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 该数据驱动方法提供了更新且可解释的工具，能够改善RP患者的选择，减少过度治疗，具有临床实用价值。

Abstract: The Charlson Comorbidities Index (CCI) is a weighted additive index widely used to estimate ten-year mortality risk, but its original weights may not reflect contemporary prognoses. This limitation is critical in Prostate Cancer (PCa), where radical treatment is recommended only for patients with a life expectancy of at least ten years. For candidates eligible for Radical Prostatectomy (RP), accurate estimation of ten-year other-cause mortality is essential to balance oncological benefit against competing risks and avoid overtreatment. We propose a data-driven framework to derive a comorbidity index tailored to PCa patients considered for RP. Using a retrospective single-institution cohort, we apply Population-Based Bio-Inspired Algorithms (PBBIAs) to recalibrate comorbidity weights and evolve alternative symbolic formulations optimized for ten-year survival discrimination. We compared six optimization strategies, including symbolic regression approaches based on Genetic Programming (GP), population-based metaheuristics, clinically validated baselines, and survival prediction models. Results show that GA, FST-PSO, and SLIM outperform both the original CCI and the PCCI, particularly when PCa-specific variables are included, improving the Concordance Index by up to 0.1. GPLearn yields compact and interpretable models with competitive performance. Overall, the proposed approach provides an updated and interpretable tool to improve patient selection for RP.

</details>


### [248] [Memristor-Based Spiking Neural Network Accelerator for Bio-inspired Interception Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31299)
*Qianhou Qu,Sheng Lu,Liuting Shang,Jaihan Utailawon,Sungyong Jung,Qilian Liang,Chenyun Pan*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于模拟忆阻器的脉冲神经网络加速器，通过在45nm工艺节点集成存内突触计算与模拟积分-发射神经元，相较于5nm数字基线，在捕食者-猎物追踪任务中实现了12.7倍能效提升和1.26倍延迟降低（MSE=0.004）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前SNN虽具有事件驱动和低功耗特性，但依赖冯·诺依曼架构的GPU/CPU平台，存在存储与计算瓶颈，限制了能效提升。

Method: 提出模拟忆阻器SNN加速器：集成存内突触计算与模拟IF神经元，消除多晶体管CMOS突触电路，支持异步事件驱动操作（45nm节点）；并设计5nm数字SNN加速器作为对比基准。

Result: 在捕食者-猎物追踪任务中，推理与理想软件推理的MSE为0.004；HSPICE仿真显示，相比数字基线，能耗降低12.7倍，延迟降低1.26倍。

Conclusion: 忆阻器神经形态电路在实现能效实时边缘智能方面具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) provide event-driven and low-power computation inspired by biological neural systems, but current implementations rely on von Neumann graphics processing units (GPUs) and central processing units (CPUs) platforms, where memory and computation bottlenecks limit energy efficiency. To address this challenge, this paper proposes an analog memristor-based spiking neural network (SNN) accelerator that integrates in-memory synaptic computation with analog integrate-and-fire (IF) neurons, eliminating multi-transistor CMOS synapse circuits and enabling asynchronous event-driven operation at the 45nm technology node. Additionally, a digital SNN accelerator is designed and optimized at the 5 nm technology node for comparison. The proposed architecture is evaluated using a predator-prey tracking task that emulates pursuit behavior. In this task, the analog SNN accelerator's inference closely matches the ideal software inference with a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.004. HSPICE simulation results show that the proposed analog SNN accelerator achieves 12.7 times lower energy consumption and 1.26 times lower delay compared to the digital baseline, demonstrating the potential of memristor-based neuromorphic circuits for energy-efficient real-time edge intelligence.

</details>


### [249] [Institutions and the transmission of upper-tail human capital: scientific lineages across a millennium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31470)
*Hiroyuki Chuma,Kanji Otsuka,Yoichi Sato*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文通过分析47万条师徒关系记录和64位菲尔兹奖得主的传承路径，构建了跨越千年的学术传承网络，发现两个关键制度转型：17世纪莱布尼茨成为学术枢纽（47/64条传承线经过他），以及84%的传承线汇聚于12-13世纪的伊斯兰/拜占庭学者，展现了知识累积依赖制度传播而非仅靠发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识累积不仅依赖科学发现，更依赖传承制度。作者希望通过量化分析学术师徒网络的结构特征，揭示历史上知识传播的制度转型。

Method: 使用Wikidata的47万条师徒记录，以64位菲尔兹奖得主为固定追踪集，向后遍历得到2550万条路径、57代的有向无环图。开发了确定性代数图遍历工具来克服大规模计算挑战。

Result: 发现两个制度转型：1）17世纪学术网络集中到莱布尼茨（47/64条传承线经过他，下游/上游比10:1），七项独立指标同步重组；2）84%的传承线上游汇聚于5位12-13世纪伊斯兰和拜占庭学者，最终止于11世纪的"修道院之墙"。

Conclusion: 知识累积的关键在于制度性传播而非发现本身。莱布尼茨与牛顿的优先权争议本质是"拥有"与"传承"的区别，传承才产生经济增长依赖的知识溢出效应。

Abstract: What made useful knowledge cumulative was not discovery alone but the institutions that transmitted it. We provide the first exhaustive structural measurement of the network through which upper-tail human capital passed from master to student across a millennium. Using 470,000 mentor-student records from Wikidata (which integrates the Mathematics Genealogy Project and MacTutor Archive), and all 64 historical Fields Medalists as a fixed, ex ante tracer set, backward traversal yields a directed acyclic graph of 25.5 million paths reaching 57 generations. We document two institutional transitions. First, a 17th-century watershed concentrates lineage traffic on Leibniz: 47 of 64 lineages pass through him with a 10:1 downstream-to-upstream ratio, and seven independent attributes -- learned-society membership (a 46-fold rise per scholar), field, language, employer, institutional diversification, student production, and diffusion entropy -- re-organize coherently across the same window. This is the network signature of Mokyr's Republic of Letters, and it reframes the Newton-Leibniz priority dispute as a distinction between the possession and the transmission of upper-tail human capital: it is transmission that generates the spillovers on which growth depends. Second, 84% of lineages converge upstream on five 12th-13th-century Islamic and Byzantine scholars before terminating at an 11th-century boundary -- the ``Monastery Wall'' -- at which personal academic mentorship first becomes record-generating in Europe. Our claims are descriptive-structural, not causal. Because exhaustive traversal at this scale defeats standard tools, we also contribute a deterministic, algebraic graph-traversal instrument whose measurement bias we characterize in closed form, and report one emergent property of independent methodological interest.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [250] [Pareto Optimality in Approval-Based Multiwinner Voting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30490)
*Joshua Schünke*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于批准的多人投票中帕累托最优委员会的结构，探讨了在受限域（候选区间和选民区间）下的单调性和可重构性，提出了“单一主导性”性质，并展示了相关算法和结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帕累托最优是衡量委员会效率的重要公理，但现有研究对其在受限域和一般域中的结构性质（如单调性和可重构性）理解不足，需要系统性的刻画。

Method: 提出了“单一主导性”性质来刻画帕累托最优；证明了在该性质下委员会单调性成立；设计了无需辅助候选人的逐步替换重构方法；改进了满足EJR+的算法以保证帕累托最优；提出了计数帕累托最优委员会数量的多项式时间算法。

Result: 在候选区间和选民区间域中，帕累托最优委员会满足单调性且可通过逐步替换重构；实现了满足EJR+且帕累托最优的算法；给出了帕累托最优委员会计数算法；揭示了无限制域中单调性和可重构性的挑战。

Conclusion: 受限域下帕累托最优委员会具有良好结构性质（单调性、可重构性），可设计高效算法；无限制域则面临更大复杂性，需要新的理论工具。

Abstract: In approval-based multiwinner voting, Pareto optimality is used as an axiom capturing efficiency of committees. We study the structure of the space of Pareto optimal committees in restricted domains and in general by investigating the monotonicity and reconfigurability of such committees. For the Candidate Interval and Voter Interval domains, we propose the Single Dominance Only property, which provides a simple characterization of Pareto optimality, and show that Pareto optimal committees satisfy committee monotonicity using this property. Further, we show that, for the above domains, any Pareto optimal committee can be reconfigured into any other Pareto optimal target committee without using auxiliary candidates, meaning that the candidates in the starting but not the target committee can be replaced by candidates in the target but not the starting committee one by one while preserving Pareto optimality at every step. In addition, we adapt a polynomial-time algorithm for finding a committee satisfying EJR+, a proportionality axiom, such that it also satisfies Pareto optimality, for the above domains. We further describe a polynomial-time algorithm for counting the number of Pareto optimal committees for voting instances satisfying Voter Interval, and give a proof idea for its correctness. For the unrestricted domain, we explain the challenges of proving committee monotonicity and reconfigurability. We provide an example in which the distance of two committees in the Pareto optimality reconfiguration graph exceeds the distance proven for the above domains, and outline an approach toward showing the connectedness of the graph.

</details>


### [251] [Model Monotonicity in Autobidding Auctions: When Do Better Predictions Lead to Better Outcomes?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31036)
*Ashwinkumar Badanidiyuru*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了推荐系统模型质量、拍卖机制和自动竞价行为之间的相互作用，定义了基于聚类细化的模型改进概念，并系统分析了在不同竞价者类型、拍卖格式和预算约束下，模型改进如何影响平台评估指标（如收入、福利等）。研究发现：无预算的tCPA竞价者在统一竞价的一价拍卖中能保证收入单调性，而二价拍卖和预算约束会破坏这一性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线广告平台的拍卖机制中，点击率/转化率预测模型的质量直接影响平台收益，但目前缺乏对模型改进如何在不同拍卖机制下影响平台评估指标的理论理解。作者希望建立一个形式化框架，来厘清模型改进、拍卖格式和自动竞价策略三者之间的复杂关系。

Method: (1) 基于概率论中滤子（filtration）的思想，提出了聚类细化（cluster refinement）作为模型改进的形式化定义；(2) 对不同组合（竞价者类型：tCPA/max-CPA；拍卖格式：一价/二价/VCG；有无预算约束）进行ECM单调性的系统刻画；(3) 利用Jensen不等式等工具进行理论证明，并构造反例展示非单调性情形。

Result: (1) 无预算的tCPA竞价者在统一竞价的一价拍卖中，收入随模型改进单调递增（通过Jensen不等式证明）；(2) 二价拍卖和预算约束会破坏这种单调性；(3) 提供了非单调性结果的完整数值构造。

Conclusion: 该研究为广告平台如何使模型改进与实际业务指标（收入、福利）对齐提供了理论指导，揭示了拍卖机制设计在模型评估中的关键作用。

Abstract: Online advertising platforms rely on machine learning models to predict click-through rates (pCTR) and conversion rates (pCVR) for auction mechanisms. We introduce a novel framework to study the interaction between recommender system model quality, auction format, and autobidder behavior. We formalize when model improvements -- defined via a refinement relation inspired by filtrations in probability theory -- lead to improvements in platform-level Evaluation Criteria Metrics (ECM) such as revenue, welfare, or liquid welfare. Our main contributions are: (1) a formal definition of model improvement based on cluster refinement, and (2) a systematic characterization of ECM monotonicity across different combinations of bidder types (tCPA, max-CPA), auction formats (first-price, second-price, VCG), and budget constraints. We show that first-price auctions with uniform bidding guarantee revenue monotonicity for tCPA bidders without budgets (via Jensen's inequality), while second-price auctions and budget constraints can break this property. We provide full numerical constructions for the non-monotonicity results. Our findings have practical implications for advertising platforms seeking to align model improvements with business outcomes.

</details>


### [252] [Envy Cycle Elimination with Strategic Agents: Best Responses and Fairness Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31253)
*Georgios Amanatidis,Georgios Birmpas,Rebecca Reiffenhäuser*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究公平分配中经典算法Envy Cycle Elimination (E-C-E)在策略性行为下的表现，发现引入激励机制后算法失去了直观清晰性，但通过不同版本设计，仍能证明纯纳什均衡的存在性并保持近似公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献表明公平与真实性不可兼得，尽管Round-Robin等简单机制的均衡公平性已有研究，但E-C-E这一通用工具在策略性环境下的行为知之甚少，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 分析E-C-E算法在策略性agent下的行为，识别不同实现细节对agent行为的影响，研究多种自然版本的纯纳什均衡存在性，并考察最佳响应下公平保障的近似保持程度。

Result: 激励机制破坏了E-C-E算法的直观清晰性；不同实现细节对agent行为有巨大影响；多种自然版本下证明了纯纳什均衡的存在性；存在某些版本在agent最佳响应下能近似保持公平性。

Conclusion: 尽管E-C-E在策略性环境中面临重大挑战，通过精心设计版本，仍可在保持近似公平性的同时确保均衡的存在性。

Abstract: With strong evidence in the literature showing that fairness and truthfulness are incompatible, there is a recent line of work focusing on the fairness properties of equilibria of simple fair division mechanisms, especially Round-Robin. We consider the Envy Cycle Elimination (E-C-E) procedure of Lipton et al. [23], one of the most versatile tools in fair division. While this simple and intuitive algorithm achieves allocations that are envy-free up to one item (EF1) for any number of agents and general monotone valuation functions, surprisingly little is known about its behavior when agents act strategically. We demonstrate how the presence of incentives, although highly natural and relevant for the majority of applications, completely removes the intuitive clarity in the algorithm's execution, even for a few agents and very simple valuation functions. Additionally, while in the standard algorithmic setting there is great flexibility in how the details of E-C-E are implemented, here additional specifications are needed before the procedure is clearly defined, the choice of which has a potentially huge impact on the agents' behavior. Despite these obstacles, for various natural versions of E-C-E, we give the first results on the existence of Pure Nash Equilibria of the resulting mechanisms, and show there exist versions where fairness guarantees are approximately preserved for agents who play best responses.

</details>


### [253] [Social welfare optimisation under institutional reward and punishment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31330)
*Van An Nguyen,Vuong Khang Huynh,Huu Loi Bui,Hai Anh Ha,Quang Dung Le,Tan Dat Nguyen,Ngoc Ngu Nguyen,Zhao Song,Manh Hong Duong,Le Hong Trang,The Anh Han*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个以社会福利为中心的激励分析框架，研究在有限混合群体中通过奖励合作者和惩罚背叛者来促进合作的机制，推导出社会福利的显式表达式，发现存在单一最优激励水平和相变现象，并证明社会福利最大化的激励要么为零要么集中在简单封闭形式目标附近，同时给出了奖励优于惩罚的条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将激励设计视为双目标优化问题（最小化机构成本同时实现高合作频率），但忽略了社会福利（总人口收益减去机构支出）的最大化问题。作者旨在填补这一空白，建立以社会福利为中心的激励分析框架。

Method: 以有限、充分混合的社会困境群体（捐赠博弈和公共物品博弈）为背景，考虑奖励合作者和惩罚背叛者两种机制，推导社会福利的期望显式表达式，分析其对激励效率和选择强度的依赖关系，并通过相变分析识别参数区域。

Result: (1) 识别出社会福利具有单一最优激励水平和发生定性相变（社会福利非单调、出现多个局部最优）的参数区间；(2) 证明社会福利最大化的激励要么为零，要么集中在简单的封闭形式目标附近，并提供高效算法计算最优点；(3) 推导出在给定预算下奖励优于惩罚的封闭形式条件；(4) 揭示了针对成本或合作频率优化的激励与最大化社会福利的激励之间存在系统性差距。

Conclusion: 以成本最小化或合作频率最大化为目标的激励设计并不等同于社会福利最大化，两者存在系统性偏差。本文提供了理论基础和可计算的最优激励方案，为多智能体系统和AI系统中的激励设计提供了新的指导原则。

Abstract: Institutional incentives are widely used to promote cooperation among autonomous, self-regarding agents, from human societies to multi-agent and AI systems. Existing work typically treats incentive design as a bi-objective problem: minimise institutional cost while achieving a high long-run frequency of cooperation. Whether such schemes also maximise social welfare - total population payoff net of institutional expenditure - has remained largely unexplored. We develop a welfare-centric framework for institutional incentives in finite, well-mixed populations playing a social dilemma (Donation Game and Public Goods Game), considering both rewards for cooperators and punishments for defectors. For each mechanism, we derive explicit expressions for expected social welfare and characterise how it depends on incentive efficiency and selection intensity. Analytically, we identify parameter regimes where social welfare has a single optimal incentive level and regimes with qualitative phase transitions, in which welfare becomes non-monotonic with multiple local optima. We prove that any welfare-maximising incentive is either zero or concentrated around a simple closed-form target, and we provide an efficient algorithm to compute these optima. Comparing reward and punishment, we further derive close-formed conditions under which reward outperform punishment in terms of social welfare for any given budget. Overall, our results reveal a systematic gap between incentives optimised for cost or cooperation frequency and those that maximise welfare.

</details>


### [254] [Used Car Salesbots? Honesty and Credulity of LLMs as Bargaining Agents under Partial Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31445)
*Antonio Valerio Miceli-Barone,Vaishak Belle,Shay B. Cohen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究模拟谈判场景中LLM智能体的行为，发现现成LLM偏离博弈论均衡，试图撒谎但无法利用信息不对称；微调优化财务效用虽能达成更优交易，但会显著增加不诚实行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在模拟谈判场景下，LLM智能体在不同信息制度中的表现，特别是优化财务收益是否会以牺牲诚实性和可信度为代价。

Method: 构建买卖双方通过文本通道谈判的模拟场景，设置三种信息制度（完全信息、信息不对称、相互不确定），评估零-shot LLM智能体和微调智能体的谈判表现、诚实性和轻信程度。

Result: 现成LLM偏离博弈论均衡；智能体试图撒谎但无法有效利用信息不对称；微调优化财务效用后智能体能达成更好交易，但变得更不诚实。

Conclusion: 优化任务性能可能牺牲智能体的安全性（诚实性），这揭示了在部署LLM智能体时需要谨慎权衡性能与安全风险。

Abstract: In this work we study agents in simulated bargaining scenarios, where a buyer and a seller communicate through a text channel and attempt to negotiate mutually beneficial trades, under different information regimes (complete information, information asymmetry or mutual uncertainty). We evaluate their performance w.r.t. game-theoretical solutions and further investigate their honesty (their tendency to disclose or withhold information or to mislead and deceive) as well as their credulity (their tendency to trust or distrust information provided by the other agent). We study zero-shot LLM agents with simple prompting scaffolding as well as fine-tuned agents, in order to investigate whether optimising the agents to maximise financial profits makes them stronger negotiators but also more dishonest and less trusting.
  We find that off-the-shelf LLMs all substantially deviate from game-theoretical equilibria, they attempt to lie about their private information but cannot efficiently exploit information asymmetries. Fine-tuning on financial utility makes the agents stronger at achieving better deals but also more dishonest, highlighting the risks that optimising agents for a task can have on their safety. We release our code and a dataset of bargaining scenarios.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [255] [FOSTER: First-order Dataset Distillation for Text-based Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30772)
*Hung Vinh Tran,Tong Chen,Xinyi Gao,Junliang Yu,Julien Monteil,Hongzhi Yin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出FOSTER，一种面向文本序列推荐的一阶数据集蒸馏方法，通过随机物品子集采样、一阶优化轨迹锚定参数重置和语义共现正则化，仅用20条合成序列即可逼近全数据集性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本序列推荐模型虽精度高但训练成本昂贵，数据集蒸馏有望压缩数据规模，但面临离散物品池大、语言模型编码导致双层优化代价过高两大挑战。

Method: (1) 随机物品子集采样，避免每步提取全语料嵌入；(2) 一阶优化+轨迹锚定参数重置，规避昂贵双层梯度计算；(3) 正则化策略，显式促进语义相似物品在合成序列中的共现。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上，FOSTER一致优于现有数据集蒸馏和核心集选择方法，仅用20条合成交互序列即可达到接近全数据集的效果。

Conclusion: FOSTER有效解决了文本序列推荐中数据集蒸馏的效率和效果问题，为大规模推荐系统的数据压缩提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Text-based sequential recommender systems, while greatly improving recommendation accuracy by incorporating item contexts, are undeniably more expensive to train. By condensing a large dataset into a compact set of synthetic samples for model training, dataset distillation offers a promising solution. However, its adoption in text-based sequential recommendation is non-trivial given the large pool of discrete items. This challenge is further compounded by language model-based item encoding, which makes bi-level optimization commonly used in dataset distillation prohibitively expensive. To this end, we propose First-order dataset distillation for Text-based Sequential Recommendation (FOSTER), which facilitates effectiveness and efficiency via three novel components: (1) stochastic item subset sampling that replaces costly full-corpus embedding extraction at each distillation step; (2) first-order optimization with trajectory-anchored parameter reset to avoid expensive bi-level gradient computation; and (3) regularization that explicitly promotes co-occurrence between semantically similar items in the synthetic sequences. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks show that FOSTER consistently outperforms existing dataset distillation and coreset selection baselines, approximating full-dataset performance using as few as 20 synthetic interaction sequences.

</details>


### [256] [On the impact of retrieved content representations in RAG Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30790)
*Jonathan J Ross,Bevan Koopman,Anton van der Vegt,Guido Zuccon*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过控制实验发现，在RAG系统中，文档表示是否保留答案（answer retention）是影响生成准确性的首要因素，而措辞、结构、长度等特征影响有限。先前研究中归因于特定机制的效果提升，可能部分源于这些机制更好地保留了答案内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统继承为人类设计的检索组件，但对LLM作为消费者时文档应如何表示缺乏理解。先前研究各自考察单一变换或属性，未系统比较哪些表示特征最重要。

Method: 在固定检索的条件下，仅改变检索文档的表示方式，对比原始基线与13种变换（涵盖选择、摘要、改写，包括查询依赖和查询无关变体），测量4个生成器的问答准确性，并对每种表示测量answer retention。

Result: Answer retention是生成器准确性的主要决定因素；当answer retention高时，措辞、结构、长度和查询依赖性影响有限。

Conclusion: 先前研究中归因于特定机制的效果提升，可能部分源于这些机制更好地保留了答案内容。若不控制answer retention，则无法确定真实归因。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) supplements a language model's input with retrieved documents, yet most RAG pipelines inherit retrieval components designed for human readers. How retrieved content should be represented when the consumer is a large language model (LLM) rather than a human is less well understood. Recent work has proposed transformations of retrieved content and identified properties that affect generation, but each examines a single transformation or property in isolation, leaving open which features of a document's representation matter most. We address this with a controlled comparison: holding retrieval fixed, we vary only the representation of retrieved documents, comparing an original baseline against thirteen transformations spanning selection, summarisation, and reformulation, in query-dependent and query-independent variants. Across these fourteen representations we measure question-answering accuracy for four generators, and for each representation we also measure answer retention: whether a known answer-bearing document still supports its answer after transformation. We find that answer retention is the primary determinant of generator accuracy; notably, when retention is high, a representation's wording, structure, length, and query-dependence have limited effect. This suggests that accuracy gains attributed to specific mechanisms in prior work may be partly explained by how well those mechanisms preserve answer-bearing content, an attribution that cannot be settled without controlling for retention.

</details>


### [257] [Inference-Free Multimodal Learned Sparse Retrieval for Production-Scale Visual Document Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30917)
*Gyu-Hwung Cho,Youngjune Lee,Kiyoon Jeong,Siyoung Lee,Sanggyu Han,Hervé Dejean,Stéphane Clinchant,Seung-won Hwang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: V-SPLADE 是一种推理无关的稀疏检索器，通过引入字幕门控令牌监督（caption-gated token supervision）解决了视觉文档检索中视觉稀疏表示无法捕捉词汇内容的问题，在六个基准上NDCG@5平均提升13.8pp（对比同规模稠密基线），在1870万文档库上R@5翻倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉文档检索方法存在两难：基于VLM的稠密/多向量模型检索质量高但需要神经编码查询，推理成本高；基于OCR或字幕的BM25方法虽避免查询编码，但需耗时的文本提取或生成。缺少一个无需推理阶段的、可大规模部署的词汇级索引视觉文档检索系统。

Method: 提出V-SPLADE，一种推理无关的稀疏检索器。核心创新是"字幕门控令牌监督"（caption-gated token supervision），这是一种仅在训练时使用的信号，利用VLM生成的字幕作为词汇线索，激活与检索相关的词汇维度，从而解决视觉稀疏表示的词汇接地问题。

Result: 在六个视觉文档检索基准上，V-SPLADE的NDCG@5比同规模稠密基线平均提升13.8个百分点，比基于OCR或字幕的BM25基线最多提升6.3个百分点。在1870万文档的大规模语料库上，R@5比同规模稠密基线提升一倍以上，通过分数融合还能进一步提升竞争检索器的R@5最多2.4个百分点。

Conclusion: V-SPLADE成功填补了视觉文档检索中无需推理阶段的稀疏检索空缺，实现了稠密级别的检索效果，且在高稀疏度下依然有效。字幕门控令牌监督有效解决了词汇接地问题，为大规模视觉文档检索提供了一种高效可部署的方案。

Abstract: As large-scale visual-document corpora such as arXiv papers and enterprise PDFs continue to grow, visual-document retrieval has gained increasing attention; yet it still lacks a deployable system that lexically indexes visual documents to serve queries without neural encoding at scale. Existing methods either achieve strong retrieval quality with VLM-based dense or multi-vector models but require neural query encoding at serving time, or avoid query encoding with OCR- or caption-based BM25 at the cost of time-consuming text extraction or generation. To fill this missing serving regime, we present V-SPLADE, an inference-free sparse retriever for visual-document retrieval. However, such inference-free multimodal learned sparse retrieval systems remain underexplored and have not yet shown dense-level effectiveness under high sparsity. We attribute this limitation to a lexical grounding problem: visual sparse representations often fail to capture the lexical content embedded in document images. To address this problem, we introduce caption-gated token supervision, a training-only signal that uses VLM-generated captions as lexical cues to activate retrieval-relevant vocabulary dimensions. With this supervision, V-SPLADE improves average NDCG@5 across six visual-document retrieval benchmarks by +13.8pp over the same-scale dense baseline and by up to +6.3pp over OCR- or caption-based BM25 baselines. On an 18.7M-document corpus, it more than doubles R@5 over the same-scale dense baseline and further improves competing retrievers through score fusion by up to +2.4pp R@5. Code will be released soon at https://github.com/naver/v-splade.

</details>


### [258] [Reading Between the Citations: A Typed Claim Network for Scientific Literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30966)
*Ning Ding,Sergio J. Rodríguez Méndez,Pouya G. Omran*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 论文提出"主张网络"（claim network）模式，将文献间的引用关系细化为带有立场标签（四类）的typed claim，并在3D点云语义分割领域127篇论文上构建了8,260条主张网络。三种下游任务（检索增强、立场摘要、拓扑分析）证明该表示优于标准RAG基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识图谱将文献间的引用关系编码为无类型边，丢失了评价性立场信息（如支持/反对），无法支持社区层面的细粒度查询（如"某文献被如何评价"）。

Method: 提出claim network模式：将每条跨文献引用实体化为带类型的claim，包含source、target、claim text和基于引文意图的四类立场标签。构建了一套通用流水线，并在127篇3D点云语义分割论文上实例化，得到8,260条typed claims。

Result: 在三个下游任务（检索信号增强、聚合立场摘要、拓扑分析）中评估。与标准RAG基线进行正面比较，证明该表示带来的增益来源于"正确的中间表示"而非"错误的中间表示"。

Conclusion: 主张网络通过显式编码引用立场，显著优于传统无类型引用图和平坦检索，为学术文献的立场感知分析提供了有效的表示范式。

Abstract: Knowledge graphs over corpora of inter-referencing documents - scholarly papers, legal opinions, policy briefs - encode the topology of reference but not its stance. The standard representation collapses a rich evaluative relation into an untyped edge, losing the very content that supports community-level queries about how one document is received by another. We propose the claim network: a representational pattern in which each cross-document reference is reified as a typed claim, carrying source, target, claim text, and a four-class stance label grounded in the citation-intent literature. We give a construction pipeline applicable to any corpus of scholarly inter-referencing documents and instantiate it on a corpus of 127 papers in 3D point cloud semantic segmentation, producing a network of 8,260 typed claims. Three downstream task families demonstrate what the network enables: retrieval signal augmentation, aggregated-stance summarisation, and topological analytics. Head-to-head evaluation against standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) baselines shows that the gain over flat retrieval is the gain from the right intermediate representation rather than the wrong one.

</details>


### [259] [Graph-GRPO: Dependency-Aware Credit Assignment for Generative E-commerce Search Relevance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31003)
*Jiarui Che,Yifei Chen,Zhixing Tian,Chenyang Wang,Ziguang Cheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Graph-GRPO，一种基于图结构扩展GRPO的方法，用于电商搜索相关性推理。通过构建推理依赖图，将CoT步骤建模为节点、逻辑依赖为边，传播结果级奖励以获得细粒度步骤级信用分配，并引入主损失驱动控制器自适应调整边权重，结合随机掩码策略初始化和多头蒸馏，构建可训练部署的生成式相关性建模框架。离线评估和在线A/B测试均验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法主要依赖结果级奖励，将整个推理链视为单一优化单元，难以区分正确与错误的推理步骤，导致信用分配偏差。过程奖励方法虽然提供更密集监督，但将推理步骤视为独立，忽略依赖驱动的错误传播，责任归属困难，限制了结构化相关性推理的优化。

Method: Graph-GRPO构建相关性推理依赖图，将CoT步骤作为节点、逻辑依赖作为边；通过图传播结果级奖励获得步骤级信用信号；引入主损失驱动控制器自适应调整边级信用传播系数；结合CoT随机掩码进行监督策略初始化，以及图节点多头蒸馏，构成完整框架。

Result: 在主流电商平台上，离线评估和线上A/B测试均表明，基于Graph-GRPO的框架在相关性分类指标和关键用户参与度指标上均有提升。

Conclusion: Graph-GRPO通过图结构化的信用分配机制，有效解决了传统RL方法在结构化相关性推理中信用分配不准的问题，为电商搜索相关性建模提供了更优的方案。

Abstract: Search relevance modeling is a core task in e-commerce search systems, assessing how well a user query matches candidate products. Rather than relying on a single holistic matching signal, relevance judgment often requires structured reasoning over query understanding, product understanding, and facet-level matching. With large language models (LLMs), this process is increasingly formulated as chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and optimized with reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing RL methods mainly rely on outcome-level rewards and treat the entire reasoning chain as a single optimization unit. This makes it difficult to distinguish faulty reasoning steps from correct intermediate ones, leading to misaligned credit assignment. Although process-reward methods provide denser supervision, they often treat reasoning steps independently and ignore dependency-driven error propagation, making responsibility attribution difficult and limiting the optimization of structured relevance reasoning. We propose Graph-GRPO, a graph-structured extension of GRPO for multi-component relevance reasoning. Graph-GRPO constructs a relevance reasoning dependency graph, where CoT steps are modeled as nodes and their logical dependencies as edges. It propagates outcome-level rewards over the graph to derive step-level credit signals, enabling more accurate fine-grained credit assignment. We further introduce a main-loss-driven controller that adaptively adjusts edge-wise credit-propagation coefficients. Together with CoT random masking for supervised policy initialization and graph-node-based multi-head distillation, we build a trainable and deployable framework for generative relevance modeling. Extensive offline evaluations and online A/B tests on a leading e-commerce platform demonstrate that the Graph-GRPO-based framework improves relevance classification metrics and key engagement metrics.

</details>


### [260] [Fighting Numerical Hallucinations via Data-centric Compilation for Online Financial QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31064)
*Hao Chen,Xing Tang,Qirui Liu,Weijie Shi,Shiwei Li,Fuyuan Lyu,Weihong Luo,Xiku Du,Xiuqiang He*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出数据为中心的推理编译器(DCRC)框架，通过对抗性数据构建、多阶段训练和编译执行推理，解决大语言模型在金融问答中的数值推理幻觉问题，有效应对RAG带来的噪声敏感、计算脆弱和审计危机三大挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在金融问答中容易出现数值推理幻觉，虽然RAG已被广泛采用，但引入了噪声敏感、计算脆弱和审计危机三大挑战，而现有模型中心方法孤立优化检索器或生成器，无法系统性解决这些问题。

Method: 提出数据中心的推理编译器(DCRC)框架，包含三个阶段：(1)对抗性数据构建——合成含可控噪声的训练样本；(2)多阶段训练——培养数据中心结构化代理(DSA)，使其具备显式证据审计和程序合成能力；(3)编译执行推理——DSA将用户查询和检索文档转化为可验证、可执行的推理程序。

Result: 在离线基准测试和真实在线金融问答系统部署中均取得有效验证，确保了可靠的数值推理能力。

Conclusion: DCRC通过数据驱动范式系统性解决了金融问答中的数值推理幻觉问题，为高可靠性场景下的LLM应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced online data services, particularly in the domain of financial question answering (FinQA). However, such systems remain susceptible to numerical reasoning hallucinations, which critically undermine reliability in high-stakes financial applications. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has been widely adopted to ground responses in external knowledge, it introduces three persistent challenges: noise sensitivity, calculation fragility, and an auditability crisis. Existing model-centric approaches, which primarily focus on optimizing either the retriever or generator in isolation, still struggle to address these issues in an integrated manner. In this work, we pioneer a data-centric paradigm and propose a novel framework, the Data-centric Reasoning Compiler (DCRC). The framework operates through three cohesive phases: (1) adversarial data construction, which synthesizes training examples with controlled noise to teach robustness; (2) multi-stage training that cultivates a Data-centric Structuring Agent (DSA) capable of explicit evidence auditing and program synthesis; and (3) a compile-and-execute inference process, where the DSA transforms user queries and retrieved documents into verifiable, executable reasoning programs. This data-driven framework ensures faithful numerical reasoning by design. We conduct extensive experiments on established offline benchmarks and further validate our framework through deployment in a real-world online financial QA system.

</details>


### [261] [MIMO: Multilingual Information Retrieval via Monolingual Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31171)
*Youngjoon Jang,Seongtae Hong,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出MIMO框架，通过两阶段训练（知识蒸馏+跨语言对比学习）解决多语言信息检索中语言聚类与嵌入均匀性之间的权衡问题，在多个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有嵌入模型主要针对多-单语言检索优化，在多语言信息检索（MLIR）场景下性能下降；传统的对比学习会加剧语言聚类，导致跨语言对齐与嵌入均匀性之间存在权衡。
